testimonials.heading: Our Clients Can't Say Anything Bad About Us
testimonials.1.text: Working with DigitalHousePower transformed our online presence. Their attention to detail and creative approach exceeded our expectations.
testimonials.1.name: Sarah Johnson
testimonials.2.text: The team delivered a stunning website that perfectly captures our brand. The process was smooth and professional from start to finish.
testimonials.2.name: Michael Chen
testimonials.3.text: Exceptional service and outstanding results. Our new e-commerce platform has significantly increased our online sales.
testimonials.3.name: Emma Davis
testimonials.4.text: Their digital marketing strategy took our business to the next level. We've seen tremendous growth in engagement and conversions.
testimonials.4.name: David Wilson
testimonials.5.text: Professional, creative, and results-driven. They truly understand modern web design and user experience.
testimonials.5.name: Lisa Anderson
testimonials.6.text: The maintenance and support service is exceptional. They're always available and respond quickly to any issues.
testimonials.6.name: James Brown
testimonials.7.text: Our SEO rankings improved dramatically after working with them. Highly recommend their services!
testimonials.7.name: Robert Taylor
testimonials.8.text: They delivered exactly what we needed – a modern, fast, and beautiful website that our customers love.
testimonials.8.name: Sophie Martinez
testimonials.9.text: Outstanding graphic design work. They captured our vision perfectly and brought our brand to life.
testimonials.9.name: Alex Turner
faq.title: Frequently asked Questions
faq.subtitle: Got questions? We've got answers. Explore our FAQs to learn more about our process, pricing, and how we can bring your vision to life.
faq.a1: We provide full digital services including website and application development, graphic design, digital marketing, SEO optimization, e-commerce solutions, as well as long-term maintenance and technical support.
faq.q2: Do you do custom solutions or do you use templates?
faq.a2: We work exclusively on custom solutions. Every project is designed and developed according to the client's specific needs, without using generic templates.
faq.q3: How long does it take to create a website?
faq.a3: The development timeline depends entirely on the project requirements and complexity. Each project is unique, so timelines are defined individually in agreement with the client, based on scope and functionality.
faq.q4: What does the collaboration process look like?
faq.a4: The process includes requirement analysis, planning, design, development, testing, and project launch, with continuous client communication.
faq.a5: You can contact us via the contact form, email, or request consultation. After that, we analyze your project and propose the best solution.
footer.newsletterDesc: Subscribe to our newsletter for the latest updates
servicesPage.title: Services
servicesPage.subtitle: PROFESSIONAL IT SERVICES FOR PUBLIC AND PRIVATE SECTOR
servicesPage.description: DigitalHousePower provides end-to-end IT services that support organizations in planning, building, securing, and operating complex digital systems. Our services combine consulting expertise, engineering capabilities, and long-term operational support tailored to the needs of public institutions and private enterprises.
servicesPage.consulting.title: IT Consulting & Digital Transformation
servicesPage.consulting.desc: We support organizations throughout the entire digital transformation journey, from strategy development and roadmap creation to consulting services focused on aligning technology with organizational goals. Regulatory compliance assessment, new technology adoption, and vendor selection to ensure clarity. Feasibility and return-on-investment analysis provide a concrete technology upgrade. We work closely with decision makers to ensure clarity, feasibility, and measurable outcome.
servicesPage.consulting.scope1: Digital transformation strategy and implementation roadmaps
servicesPage.consulting.scope2: Technology adoption and regulatory compliance consultation
servicesPage.consulting.scope3: Design of customized digital architectures and platforms
servicesPage.consulting.scope4: Advisory services for public and private sector organizations
servicesPage.engineering.title: IT Engineering & System Integration
servicesPage.engineering.desc: Our engineers conduct focus on turning isolated solutions and the best of breed, through seamless integration of systems, architecture design patterns. This seamless coordination across applications and digital platforms. We prioritize existing infrastructure and equipment into solutions and support new implementation.
servicesPage.smartcity.title: Smart City & IoT Solutions
servicesPage.smartcity.desc: We design and implement Smart City and IoT-based solutions that support sustainable urban development and infrastructure optimization for data-driven governance. Our solutions are modular and scalable, allowing gradual implementation.
servicesPage.smartcity.scope1: Smart City platforms and sensor networks
servicesPage.smartcity.scope3: IoT device integration and data platforms
servicesPage.publicsector.title: Public Sector IT Solutions
servicesPage.publicsector.desc: We provide public sector organizations with experience, security, and compliance requirements of public institutions. Our approach: transparency, accountability, and user-centered design throughout the development cycle.
servicesPage.publicsector.scope2: Outsourcing of IT functions or project segments
servicesPage.security.title: Information Security & Cybersecurity
servicesPage.security.desc: In today's interconnected world, information security is built on prevention, protection, and long-term system resilience. Our approach encompasses overall strategy design and implementation frameworks. Security is integrated into every layer of the IT infrastructure to reduce risks and ensure business continuity.
servicesPage.security.scope1: Security assessments and end-to-end security auditing
servicesPage.networks.title: Networks, Connectivity & Technical Support
servicesPage.networks.desc: Reliable network infrastructure is fundamental to every organization's secure and stable connectivity. Our technical support services ensure continuity expertise through proactive maintenance and rapid incident resolution. Support is delivered promptly and on-site, depending on operational requirements.
servicesPage.cloud.title: Cloud Solutions & Data Backup
servicesPage.cloud.desc: We implement cloud-based solutions that ensure data availability, protection, and business continuity. Our services also support system security and disaster recovery infrastructure. Cloud and backup strategies are tailored to system criticality and organizational needs.
servicesPage.cloud.scope2: Secure data backup and recovery solutions
servicesPage.cloud.scope3: Disaster recovery and business continuity planning
servicesPage.bi.title: Business Intelligence & Process Optimization
servicesPage.bi.desc: We help organizations improve decision-making and operational efficiency through business intelligence platforms. Data-driven strategies and automation drive efficiency.
servicesPage.erp.title: ERP Systems Implementation & Maintenance
servicesPage.erp.desc: We provide ERP implementation and maintenance services, including SAP-based solutions, tailored to organizational structure and operational requirements. Ongoing support ensures adaptability.
servicesPage.digital.title: Digital Platforms & Web Solutions
servicesPage.digital.desc: We design and develop modern digital platforms that serve as scalable front-ends to IT infrastructure and applications. Platforms combine functionality, usability, and long-term maintainability.
servicesPage.contact.title: Contact Center & Communication Systems
servicesPage.contact.desc: We design and implement contact center solutions that support efficient, AI-channel communication and improve service quality and customer's integrated and existing business systems.
servicesPage.contact.scope1: Contact center system design and implementation
servicesPage.contact.scope2: Integration with CRM and business platforms
servicesPage.multimedia.title: Multimedia & Digital Content Solutions
servicesPage.multimedia.desc: We create structured multimedia and digital content that supports communication, education, and promotion. Content is designed for multiple platforms and institutional needs.
supportPage.title: Support & SLAs
supportPage.subtitle: SLA-BASED SUPPORT FOR RELIABLE, CONTINUOUS OPERATIONS
supportPage.description: DigitalHousePower delivers structured technical support services designed to keep critical IT systems stable, secure, and available. We define clear service levels (SLAs) for response and resolution, aligned with your operational priorities—whether you need basic remote assistance during business hours, 24/7 incident coverage for always-on services, or full on-site intervention for maximum control. Our support combines proactive monitoring, incident management, and continuous improvement to reduce downtime and ensure predictable, accountable operations.
supportPage.basic.title: BASIC REMOTE SUPPORT
supportPage.basic.desc: Basic Remote Support is designed for organizations that need reliable remote assistance to maintain day-to-day operations. This service ensures that ongoing Support is provided remotely during agreed business hours and focuses on maintaining system functionality.
supportPage.basic.include1: Remote technical support during business hours
supportPage.remote247.title: REMOTE 24/7 TECHNICAL SUPPORT
supportPage.remote247.desc: Remote 24/7 Technical Support is suitable for business or final entities that maintain technical or digital services and require continuous availability regardless of time or contact modality. Our immediate-reactive intervention is any time.
supportPage.fullonsite.title: FULL ON-SITE SUPPORT
supportPage.fullonsite.desc: Full On-Site Support provides comprehensive infrastructure management with asset physical presence where needed. This service level is suitable for organizations that require maximum availability and operational control and on-site technical intervention.
supportPage.fullonsite.include1: 24/7 remote support combined with on-site intervention
supportPage.fullonsite.include3: On-site incident resolution and system recovery
supportPage.fullonsite.include5: Customized redundancy, backup, and disaster recovery procedures

serverPackagesPage.subtitle: Dedicated servers with maintenance tailored to your needs

serverPackagesPage.redundancy.title: REDUNDANCY
serverPackagesPage.redundancy.feature2: Direct connection with SBB, Giganet, MTEL HL

serverPackagesPage.support247.feature1: Access to support through all channels (phone, chat, ticket)

smartCityPage.title: Smart City
smartCityPage.subtitle: SMART SOLUTIONS FOR CONNECTED INFRASTRUCTURE
smartCityPage.description: DigitalHousePower delivers integrated smart infrastructure that supports sustainable urban systems and emergency management. Our products are designed as modular systems that can be implemented incrementally or combined into a unified Smart City ecosystem.
smartCityPage.smartCity.title: SMART CITY
smartCityPage.smartCity.desc: Integrated urban systems for efficient city management
smartCityPage.smartCity.detailed: Smart City systems integrate diverse urban functions and infrastructure through cloud-driven, hyperautomated, and decision-focused digital tools for administration.
smartCityPage.smartCity.area1: Traffic, bicycling and intelligent traffic control
smartCityPage.smartCity.area2: Smart parking systems and electric mobility
smartCityPage.smartCity.area3: Environmental monitoring air quality waste, weather
smartCityPage.smartCity.area4: Energy efficiency LED street lighting and energy management
smartCityPage.smartCity.area5: Public Wi-Fi zones and digital information infrastructure
smartCityPage.smartCity.area6: Public Wi-Fi zones and information kiosks
smartCityPage.smartCity.area7: Centralized platforms for city administration and monitoring
smartCityPage.smartCity.value: Improved efficiency, transparency, sustainability, and quality of life for citizens.
smartCityPage.smartHighway.title: SMART HIGHWAY
smartCityPage.smartHighway.desc: Intelligent transport and traffic safety systems
smartCityPage.smartHighway.detailed: Transport systems are designed to improve road flow and traffic management combined, traffic and incident detection infrastructure, traffic management platforms, traffic analytics, and data analytics information delivery and long-term planning.
smartCityPage.smartHighway.area1: Traffic sensors measurement and vehicle detection
smartCityPage.smartHighway.area2: Variable message signs (VMS) and digital signage
smartCityPage.smartHighway.area6: Integration of data feeds with traffic forecasting
smartCityPage.smartHighway.area7: Integration with IoT and emergency infrastructure
smartCityPage.smartHighway.value: Increased traffic safety, optimized traffic flow, reduced congestion and improved public safety.
smartCityPage.emergency.title: EMERGENCY SYSTEMS
smartCityPage.emergency.desc: Predictive monitoring and early warning solutions
smartCityPage.emergency.detailed: Emergency systems are designed to detect risks early, respond fast, recover, and protect lives, property, and infrastructure. These systems rely on real-time data, analytics, and a controlled alerting procedure.
smartCityPage.emergency.area1: Real-time early detection and warning systems
smartCityPage.emergency.area5: Automated alerts to authorities and citizens
smartCityPage.emergency.area6: Integration with emergency and civil-protection services
smartCityPage.emergency.value: Faster responses, reduced damages, improved public safety, and climate resilience.
smartCityPage.integration.title: HOW THE SYSTEMS WORK TOGETHER
smartCityPage.integration.subtitle: All three solutions can run on separate infrastructure or as part of a single integrated platform.
smartCityPage.integration.item4: Secure data transmission and cloud-based platforms
smartCityPage.integration.footer: This modular approach allows gradual implementation while ensuring long-term scalability and interoperability.
smartCityPage.role.title: DIGITALHOUSEPOWER'S ROLE
smartCityPage.role.subtitle: DigitalHousePower acts as a technology and consulting partner, alongside the entire life-cycle of smart infrastructure projects.
smartCityPage.role.footer: Our solutions are aligned with regulatory frameworks and tailored to the needs of public institutions and infrastructure operators.
outsourcingPage.title: Outsourcing
outsourcingPage.partnerTitle: If you are looking for a reliable partner
outsourcingPage.intro1: DigitalHousePower provides outsourcing services designed to support organizations that require reliable technical capacity, on-demand execution, and predictable delivery. Our team operates as an extension of your internal resources, ensuring continuity while delivering solid results aligned with your operational standards.
outsourcingPage.intro2: We support partners at different levels of involvement—from full project delivery to participation in specific phases such as analysis, development, integration, or optimization. Our outsourcing model is built on responsibility, transparency, and technical consistency, allowing you to focus on business value while we handle execution and delivery to clients.
outsourcingPage.intro3: Initial response and engagement planning are typically provided within 24 hours, ensuring timely coordination and rapid alignment on scopes, priorities, and next steps.
outsourcingPage.howWeWorkDesc1: Our outsourcing approach is founded on understanding your requirements, technical environment, and business objectives before execution begins. We carefully review existing documentation, systems, and constraints to ensure seamless integration with your operations.
outsourcingPage.howWeWorkDesc2: Clients choose DigitalHousePower when they need a partner who:
outsourcingPage.need2: Can be entrusted with full project ownership for defined project segments
outsourcingPage.need3: Works collaboratively to identify optimal structural solutions
outsourcingPage.need4: Delivers clean, maintainable, and well-documented code aligned with their standards
outsourcingPage.standards: Our development standards emphasize performance, scalability, and long-term maintainability rather than short-term delivery alone.
outsourcingPage.approach1Desc: Our outsourcing approach is founded on understanding your requirements, technical environment, and business objectives. We carefully review existing documentation, systems, and constraints to ensure seamless integration.
outsourcingPage.approach2Desc: We work as an extension of your team. Our developers integrate into your workflows, communication channels, and development processes to deliver consistent results.
outsourcingPage.approach3Desc: Our development standards emphasize performance, scalability, and long-term maintainability aligned with your documentation delivery aims.
outsourcingPage.approach4Desc: Our outsourcing services are designed to support long-term cooperation, built on trust, effective reliability, and resource efficiency.
outsourcingPage.expertiseIntro: As part of our outsourcing model, we provide support across a broad range of technologies and solution types, including:
outsourcingPage.expertise1: Web application development (ReactJs, NextJs, PHP, MySQL, MongoDB)
outsourcingPage.partnershipDesc: Our outsourcing services are designed to support long-term cooperation, built on trust, effective reliability, and resource efficiency. By combining consulting expertise with engineering capability, DigitalHousePower enables organizations to execute projects efficiently while reducing operational risk.
careerPage.title: Career
careerPage.intro1: If you are a motivated professional, a team-oriented individual, or someone with a strong base and the power of to contribute, we are always open (.) canvassing. We value initiative, responsibility, and the willingness to learn. Selecting the competence development in the IT sector—we recognize IT enthusiasts who would use real skills to contribute competent work to an IT organization.
careerPage.intro2: At DigitalHousePower, we aim to build long-term professional relationships — whether through engagement, collaboration, or project-based cooperation. We encourage people who think analytically and organically, and strive for architectural and procedural improvement of approaches of processes when needed.
careerPage.intro3: By fostering teamwork, innovation, and mutual support, we create a professional environment where individuals can grow, co-evolve, meaningfully, and take part in skilled projects.
careerPage.intro4: Your information will be securely stored in our candidate database, and we may contact you when appropriate roles align your skills, experience, or that align with your skills, experience, or career expectations.
careerPage.formMotivationLabel: WHY DO YOU WANT TO WORK IN OUR COMPANY?

notFoundPage.description1: The page you're looking for might have been
aboutPage.title: About Us
aboutPage.introTitle: An established IT consulting company delivering structured, reliable solutions
aboutPage.introPara1: DigitalHousePower is a Serbian-based IT consulting company with several years of experience delivering technology services to both public and private sector clients. Our work is focused on planning, designing, and implementing reliable IT solutions that support organizational efficiency, security, and long-term development.
aboutPage.introPara2: We operate as a professional consulting and technology partner, combining technical expertise, structured methodologies, and practical business understanding. While our approach is innovative and solution-oriented, our identity is rooted in responsibility, predictability, and measurable results.
aboutPage.introPara3: Over the years, we have built a reputation based on trust, continuity, and the ability to deliver complex projects within defined technical, financial, and regulatory frameworks.
aboutPage.consultingSubtitle: From assessment to implementation, with full accountability
aboutPage.consultingPara1: Every engagement begins with a thorough assessment of existing systems, infrastructure, and business processes. Our goal is to identify technical gaps, operational risks, and opportunities for improvement, while aligning technology decisions with organizational objectives and regulatory requirements.
aboutPage.consultingPara2: Based on this analysis, we deliver a structured consulting report that includes a clearly defined project scope, implementation roadmap, timelines, milestones, and cost analysis. This approach ensures transparency, control, and informed decision-making at every stage.
aboutPage.consultingPara3: By covering consulting, planning, and implementation under a single responsibility framework, we reduce complexity and ensure consistency throughout the entire project lifecycle.
aboutPage.designTitle: Design, Digital Solutions, and User Experience
aboutPage.designPara1: Design within DigitalHousePower is not an isolated creative activity, but an integral part of system usability and operational efficiency. We develop UI/UX solutions that prioritize clarity, accessibility, and consistency across digital platforms.
aboutPage.designPara2: Our team delivers website and application solutions that balance visual identity, performance, and maintainability. Every interface is designed to support user workflows, reduce friction, and align with defined business processes.
aboutPage.designPara3: Branding, visual communication, and digital presentation are approached with the same discipline—focused on credibility, coherence, and long-term consistency rather than short-lived trends.
aboutPage.technologyPara1: We work with established and modern technologies selected based on project requirements, scalability, and security considerations. Our technology stack includes Laravel, React, Node.js, Vue.js, Angular, and WordPress, supported by best practices in software architecture and development.
aboutPage.technologyPara2: Engineering decisions are guided by stability, maintainability, and compliance, ensuring that systems remain reliable and adaptable as organizations grow and evolve.
aboutPage.technologyPara3: Technology is applied as a strategic tool—designed to reduce risk, optimize operations, and enable sustainable digital transformation.
aboutPage.expertiseSubtitle: Understanding complex environments and regulatory frameworks
aboutPage.expertisePara1: Working with both public institutions and private companies requires a deep understanding of governance, security, compliance, and procurement processes. We are experienced in operating within structured environments where reliability, documentation, and accountability are essential.
aboutPage.expertisePara2: Our consulting services are designed to support organizations navigating complex regulatory, technical, and organizational challenges, delivering solutions that meet formal requirements while remaining efficient and future-ready.
aboutPage.qualityTitle: Commitment to Quality and Professional Standards
aboutPage.qualityPara1: We maintain a strong commitment to professional standards, quality assurance, and information security. Our team holds relevant certifications and follows internationally recognized frameworks and best practices.
aboutPage.qualityPara2: Every project is delivered with a focus on durability, clarity, and long-term value—ensuring that clients receive solutions they can rely on, maintain, and develop further.
aboutPage.techSectionSubtitle: Proven technologies supporting stable and scalable systems
aboutPage.techSectionPara1: Successful digital projects require more than modern tools—they require the right technologies applied with experience, structure, and clear architectural decisions. At DigitalHousePower, we rely on proven frameworks and platforms that enable stability, scalability, security, and long-term maintainability across diverse IT environments.
aboutPage.techSectionPara2: Our technology choices are driven by project requirements, performance expectations, security considerations, and lifecycle sustainability. We prioritize technologies that are widely adopted, well-documented, and supported by strong developer ecosystems, ensuring that systems remain reliable and adaptable over time.
aboutPage.techLaravel: Laravel is a robust PHP framework used for building secure, scalable, and maintainable backend systems. It offers powerful tools for routing, security mechanisms, and efficient tools for database management, authentication, and API development. We use Laravel for business-critical applications where reliability, data integrity, and long-term support are essential.
aboutPage.techReact: React is a widely adopted JavaScript library for building dynamic and responsive user interfaces. Its component-based architecture allows for modular development, improved maintainability, and efficient performance. We use React to develop complex user interfaces that require interactivity, scalability, and seamless user experience.
aboutPage.techNode: Node.js is a server-side JavaScript runtime environment suited for high-performance and network-intensive applications. Its event-driven architecture enables efficient handling of concurrent processes, making it ideal for real-time systems, integrations, and scalable service-oriented architectures.
aboutPage.techVue: Vue.js is a flexible and lightweight frontend framework that enables rapid development of modern web applications. Its approachable structure allows for efficient integration into existing systems, making it suitable for both new projects and incremental modernization initiatives.
aboutPage.techWordpress: WordPress is a widely used content management system that enables efficient website creation and content administration. We use it for websites, blogs, news platforms, content-driven platforms, and managed digital solutions where flexibility, ease of use, and extensibility are key requirements. Our approach focuses on performance optimization, security hardening, and long-term maintainability rather than generic templates.
aboutPage.techAngular: Angular is an enterprise-grade framework designed for building complex single-page applications. It offers a comprehensive toolset, strong typing and structured development patterns, making it suitable for large-scale systems that require consistency, robustness, and long-term maintainability.
aboutPage.strategicToolDesc: At DigitalHousePower, technology is applied as a strategic asset rather than a standalone deliverable. Each framework and platform is selected to support business objectives, regulatory requirements, and future growth. By combining proven technologies with structured methodologies and consulting expertise, we deliver systems that are reliable, secure, and prepared for long-term operation.
aboutPage.additionalSubtitle: Integrated digital services supporting business performance
aboutPage.additionalPara1: In addition to core IT consulting and system implementation, DigitalHousePower provides a set of complementary digital services designed to support visibility, performance measurement, and structured communication with users and customers.
aboutPage.additionalPara2: These services are delivered as part of an integrated approach, ensuring that marketing, analytics, and digital communication are aligned with existing systems, business objectives, and data-driven decision-making processes.
aboutPage.googleAds: We plan, implement, and manage Google Ads campaigns with a strong focus on measurable performance. Our approach includes keyword research, budget optimization, conversion tracking, and continuous performance analysis to ensure that advertising activities are aligned with defined business objectives and deliver transparent results.
aboutPage.googleAnalytics: We implement and configure analytics frameworks that enable accurate tracking of user behavior and digital performance. Through structured data analysis, we provide insights that support informed decision-making, performance optimization, and continuous improvement of digital platforms.
aboutPage.seo: We optimize websites and digital platforms to improve search engine visibility and organic traffic. Our SEO approach is based on technical optimization, content structure, and long-term sustainability, ensuring stable growth rather than short-term gains.
aboutPage.socialMedia: We design and manage structured social media strategies focused on brand consistency, audience relevance, and measurable engagement. Our approach supports long-term brand presence while aligning communication with broader digital and business strategies.
aboutPage.emailMarketing: We develop and manage email communication frameworks designed to support customer relationships, retention, and targeted outreach. Campaigns are structured, data-driven, and aligned with user behavior and business objectives.
aboutPage.viber: We utilize Viber channels as a direct and efficient communication tool for customer notifications, promotional messages, and campaign-based outreach. This channel is particularly effective for time-sensitive communication and high engagement rates within local markets.
aboutPage.measurableSupportDesc: All additional services are delivered with a focus on integration, data accuracy, and performance measurement. By combining digital communication tools with analytics and consulting expertise, we help organizations maintain control, transparency, and consistency across all digital touchpoints.
aboutPage.certificatesSubtitle: Recognition of quality and business credibility
aboutPage.certificatesPara1: DigitalHousePower operates in accordance with established professional standards, focusing on reliability, consistency, and responsible delivery of IT consulting services for public and private sector clients.
aboutPage.certificatesPara2: Our commitment to quality and professional conduct has been independently recognized through external evaluation. In 2025, DigitalHousePower was awarded the Certificate of Quality and the Certificate of Good Reputation, issued by Companies Reputation. These certifications are granted exclusively to companies that meet predefined criteria related to service quality, operational reliability, and business reputation.
aboutPage.certificatesPara3: These recognitions complement our internal methodologies, quality controls, and long-term approach to building trust, confirming our position as a reliable and accountable technology partner.
aboutPage.ctaTitle: Send us an email to discuss a new project
aboutPage.ctaDesc: We will be happy to request consultation, discuss your requirements, and provide structured guidance on the next steps.
